Vendor Details Review vendor information. @if (vendorStore.error()) {
{{ vendorStore.error() }}
} @if (vendorStore.isLoading() && !vendorStore.selectedItem()) {
Loading vendor...
} @else if (vendorStore.selectedItem(); as vendor) {
Name
{{ vendor.name }}
Country Code
{{ vendor.countrycode || '—' }}
Currency Code
{{ vendor.currencycode || '—' }}
State
{{ vendor.state || '—' }}
Mobile
{{ vendor.mobile || '—' }}
Email
{{ vendor.email || '—' }}
GSTIN
{{ vendor.gstin || '—' }}
PAN
{{ vendor.pan || '—' }}
Description
{{ vendor.description || 'No description' }}
@if (vendor.address) {
Address
House / Building
{{ vendor.address.name || '—' }}
Line 1
{{ vendor.address.line1 || '—' }}
@if (vendor.address.line2) {
Line 2
{{ vendor.address.line2 }}
}
Street
{{ vendor.address.street || '—' }}
City
{{ vendor.address.city || '—' }}
ZIP Code
{{ vendor.address.zip || '—' }}
} } @else {
Vendor not found.
} Edit
